Rogue"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-lg text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-border pl-4","children":"We're launching a new kind of AI automation—agent teams with built-in guardrails, isolation, and human approval workflows."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"border-t border-border mb-12"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose-zaplit","children":[["$","h2","0",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Problem With AI Automation Today"}],["$","p","1",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Most AI automation tools hand agents a set of credentials and say \"go figure it out.\" The agent can read your emails, write to your database, send messages on your behalf, and in some cases, execute code on your servers. There are no guardrails. No isolation. No human checkpoints."]}],"$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f"]}],"$L20","$L21","$L22"]}]}],"$L23"]}]
f:["$","p","2",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This is dangerous. Not because AI is malicious—but because it makes mistakes. Confident, fast, plausible-sounding mistakes that can delete production records, spam your customer list, or leak sensitive data before anyone notices."]}]
10:["$","p","3",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We built Zaplit because we needed a better answer."]}]
11:["$","h2","4",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"What Makes Zaplit Different"}]
12:["$","p","5",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Every agent we deploy runs in a sandboxed isolation container. That means:"]}]
13:["$","p","6",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["",["$","strong","1",{"children":"Database Protection"}],": Agents get read-only access by default. They can query your data to inform decisions, but they cannot execute DROP commands, UPDATE production records, or modify schema. Any write operation requires explicit human approval."]}]
14:["$","p","7",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["",["$","strong","1",{"children":"Communication Guards"}],": Agents draft emails and messages—they never send them directly. Bulk sends to more than 10 recipients always surface in the approval queue. Your agents become incredibly efficient drafters, not autonomous broadcasters."]}]
15:["$","p","8",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["",["$","strong","1",{"children":"Instruction Firewall"}],": Agents cannot instruct your employees to do things outside predefined workflows. This prevents prompt injection attacks and social engineering scenarios where a malicious input tries to make your agent trick your team."]}]
16:["$","h2","9",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Human-in-the-Loop Architecture"}]
17:["$","p","10",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We built an approval queue that sits at the center of everything. Before any consequential action—sending a campaign, processing a large payment, modifying a workflow—the agent creates a structured approval request with full context: what it wants to do, why, and what the expected outcome is."]}]
18:["$","p","11",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["You approve or reject in seconds. The agent continues or tries an alternative path."]}]
19:["$","p","12",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["This isn't a limitation. It's the product. Your team stays in control. Your agents handle the volume. Together, you move faster than either could alone."]}]
1a:["$","h2","13",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"Built on Open Standards"}]
1b:["$","p","14",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Zaplit runs on open source infrastructure. You own the connections. There's no proprietary lock-in. If you ever want to take your workflows and run them yourself, you can."]}]
1c:["$","p","15",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We believe AI infrastructure should be transparent, auditable, and yours."]}]
1d:["$","h2","16",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"What's Next"}]
1e:["$","p","17",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We're accepting a small number of early clients. We work with you directly to map your workflows, configure your agent team, and deploy with white-glove support. No self-serve signup. No generic plans."]}]
1f:["$","p","18",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["If that sounds like what you've been looking for, let's talk."]}]
